violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the prep unit and the small coca cola fridge. Refrigerator door gasket must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of fridge #3 and the small coca cola fridge have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2025
The door to the establishment's toilet room is not self-closing. Toilet room doors that open to food preparation spaces shall be self-closing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025
The floor tiles in the kitchen area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2026

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Sausages were observed placed hot in the prep station in containers greater than four inches deep. Sausages observed at 74 degrees F. Per interview of staff, sausages were prepared 1 hour prior to this inspection. -Proper cooling methods reviewed. Staff moved the sausages to the freezer during this inspection to allow for rapid cooling. -Establishment shall keep a cooling food temperature log for all foods in the cooling process. -Cooling food temperature log shall be completed and provided to Inspector upon the next inspection date. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2023

Refrigerator door gaskets at the 1 door true refrigerator and gaskets at the main refrigerator were observed in poor repair. Gaskets shall be repaired or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the walls and fans in the 1 door true refrigerator have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. The non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned as often as necessary to prevent buildup of residue. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2023

The door to the establishment's toilet room is not self-closing. 6-202.14 Toilet Rooms, Enclosed. Completely enclosed toilet facilities minimize the potential for the spread of disease by the movement of flies and other insects between the toilet facility and food preparation areas. -Except where a toilet room is located outside a FOOD ESTABLISHMENT and does not open directly into the FOOD ESTABLISHMENT such as a toilet room that is provided by the management of a shopping mall, a toilet room located on the PREMISES shall be completely enclosed and provided with a tight-fitting and self-closing door. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2023

The floors in the kitchen prep area and walls observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Floors/walls shall be smooth, durable, non-absorbent, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2023
